note: source of truth: Core/Chart/ChartHelper.cs ParseChartType() for the classic (c:chart) family, Core/Chart/ChartExBuilder.cs IsExtendedChartType() for the extended (cx:chart) family. Adding a new chartType value MUST update both the handler and this file in the same PR — contract tests enforce equivalence. Axis configuration: chart-level axis* props (axismin, axismax, axistitle, axisfont, ...) are Add-time only; for post-creation axis Set/Get use the chart-axis element.

chartType.readback: normalized chartType string without modifiers (modifiers surface as separate flags in later iterations)

title.description: chart title text. Get also returns sub-keys title.font, title.size, title.color, title.bold when set; these are get-only readback fields surfaced from chart title runs.

categories.description: comma-separated category labels, OR a cell range reference (e.g. Sheet1!A2:A5)

data.description: legacy compact series syntax. Prefer per-series keys (see chart-series). Format: 'Name:1,2,3' or 'Name1:1,2,3;Name2:4,5,6'

colors.description: comma-separated series fill colors, positional (1st color → series 1). Per-series dotted keys (series1.color=...) override positions.

preset.description: named style bundle. Values: minimal, dark, corporate, magazine, dashboard, colorful, monochrome (alias mono).

style.description: built-in chart style id 1..48; pass 'none' to clear.

anchor.description: absolute placement on slide; cm-based 'x,y,w,h' or named anchor token.

dataRange.description: external workbook range source for series; Add-time only.

legend.description: legend position. Values: none|false (hide), top|t, bottom|b, left|l, right|r, topRight|tr. Hyphen and underscore variants accepted (top-right, top_right).

legendfont.description: legend text font. Format: 'size:color:fontname' (any segment optional).

legendoverlay.description: if true, legend overlays the plot area instead of reserving space.

direction.description: Chart-level reading direction. rtl stamps a:rtl="1" on chartSpace c:txPr lvl1pPr so default text bodies (axis labels, data labels) render right-to-left for Arabic / Hebrew.

datalabels.description: show/hide data labels. Use 'none' to hide; otherwise comma list of flags: value, percent, category, series, all (also accepts seriesName/categoryName/percentage/values aliases). Position values (outsideEnd/center/insideEnd/insideBase/top/bottom/left/right/bestFit) implicitly enable showVal and apply as dLblPos.

labelpos.description: data label position. Values: center|ctr, insideEnd|inEnd|inside, insideBase|inBase|base, outsideEnd|outEnd|outside, bestFit|best|auto, top|t, bottom|b, left|l, right|r. Restrictions: not supported on doughnut/area/radar/stock; pie maps everything to bestFit; stacked series clamp to ctr/inBase/inEnd; combo charts skip entirely.

labelfont.description: data label text font. Format: 'size:color:fontname' (any segment optional).

labeloffset.description: category-axis label offset 0..1000 (percent of font height); category axis only.

labelrotation.description: tick-label rotation in degrees (-90..90). Bare 'labelrotation' targets both axes; xaxis.* targets category, yaxis./valaxis.* targets value.

leaderlines.description: show/hide leader lines connecting data labels to slices (pie/doughnut).

axistitle.description: value (Y) axis title; pass 'none' to remove.

cattitle.description: category (X) axis title; pass 'none' to remove.

axisnumfmt.description: value-axis number format code (Excel format string).

axisfont.description: tick-label font on every axis (category, value, date). Format: 'size:color:fontname' (any segment optional).

majortickmark.description: major tick mark style. Values: none|false, in|inside, out|outside, cross|both.

minortickmark.description: minor tick mark style. Values: none|false, in|inside, out|outside, cross|both.

ticklabelpos.description: tick-label position relative to axis. Values: none, high|top, low|bottom, nextTo (default).

ticklabelskip.description: draw tick labels every Nth category (category axis).

axisposition.description: category-axis spine position. Values: top|t, bottom|b, left|l, right|r (default bottom).

axisorientation.description: value-axis direction. true|maxmin reverses (max at origin); false|minmax restores default.

axisline.description: axis spine line style applied to both axes. Format: 'color', 'color:width', or 'color:width:dash'; or 'none'.

cataxisline.description: category-axis spine line style; same format as axisline.

valaxisline.description: value-axis spine line style; same format as axisline.

axisvisible.description: show/hide both axes. axis.delete inverts the sense (true = hidden).

logbase.description: value-axis logarithmic base (2..1000 typically). Shorthand: true|yes|log|1 → base 10; false|none|linear|0 removes log scale.

crosses.description: where the value axis crosses the category axis. Values: autoZero (default), max, min.

crossesat.description: explicit numeric crossing value on the value axis (overrides crosses).

crossbetween.description: value-axis crossing style. Values: between (default), midcat|midpoint.

dispunits.description: value-axis display units divisor. Values: none, hundreds, thousands, tenThousands|10000, hundredThousands|100000, millions, tenMillions|10000000, hundredMillions|100000000, billions, trillions.

gridlines.description: value-axis major gridlines. true|false toggle, or line spec 'color', 'color:width', 'color:width:dash' to style; 'none' removes.

minorgridlines.description: value-axis minor gridlines; same format as gridlines.

majorTickMark.description: major tick mark style (out / in / cross / none).

minorTickMark.description: minor tick mark style (out / in / cross / none).

tickLabelPos.description: tick label position (high / low / nextTo / none).

dispBlanksAs.description: how empty cells render (gap leaves a hole, zero plots as 0, span connects across).

varyColors.description: vary colors by data point (single-series charts).

showMarker.description: show markers on line/scatter series at chart level.

plotFill.description: plot-area background fill. Solid color, gradient 'c1-c2[:angle]', or 'none'.

chartareafill.description: chart-area background fill. Solid color, gradient, or 'none'.

chartborder.description: chart-area outer border line. Same format as plotborder.

areafill.description: fill applied to every series shape. Solid color or gradient 'c1-c2[:angle]'.

linewidth.description: line width in points (applies to every series line).

linedash.description: line dash style for every series. Values: solid, dash, dashDot, dot, lgDash, lgDashDot, sysDash, sysDot, sysDashDot.

marker.description: marker symbol for line/scatter/radar series only (other types silently skipped). Format: 'symbol' or 'symbol:size' or 'symbol:size:color'. Symbols: none, auto, circle, square, diamond, triangle, x, plus, star, dash, dot, picture.

showmarker.description: toggle markers on line series; on scatter, false sets marker symbol to none.

transparency.description: series fill transparency (0..100, percent). 'transparency' is inverse of 'opacity'/'alpha' (transparency=30 ≡ opacity=70).

gradient.description: gradient fill applied to every series. Format: 'c1-c2[-c3][:angle]' (angle in degrees). Errors if chart has no series.

gradients.description: per-series gradient fills, semicolon-separated; one entry per series.

view3d.description: 3D view angles. Format: 'rotX,rotY,perspective' (any tail optional) or single integer for perspective only. Named-key form (rotX=...) is rejected.

trendline.description: add trendline to every series. Format: 'type[:order]' or 'type:forward:backward'. Types: linear (default), exp|exponential, log|logarithmic, poly|polynomial, power, movingAvg|moving|movingAverage. Order applies to poly/movingAvg. Pass 'none' to clear.

secondaryaxis.description: comma-separated 1-based series indices to plot on a secondary value axis.

referenceline.description: horizontal reference / target line. Format: 'value' or 'value:color' or 'value:color:label' or 'value:color:label:dash'. Pass 'none' to remove.

combotypes.description: rebuild as combo chart with per-series chart types (column,line,area,...). Comma-separated, one per series.

scatterstyle.description: scatter chart subtype. Values: line|lineOnly, lineMarker, marker|markerOnly, smooth|smoothLine, smoothMarker.

radarstyle.description: radar chart subtype. Values: standard|line, marker, filled|fill.

varycolors.description: if true, color each data point differently within a single series (typical default for pie/doughnut).

dispblanksas.description: how to render empty cells. Values: gap, zero, span (alias connect). Unknown values throw.

plotvisonly.description: if true, skip plotting hidden worksheet rows/columns.

gapwidth.description: gap between bar/column groups, 0..500 (percent of bar width).

overlap.description: bar/column overlap within a group, -100..100 (negative = gap, positive = overlap).

gapdepth.description: depth gap between series in 3D bar/line/area charts (percent).

shape.description: 3D bar shape. Values: box|cuboid, cone, coneToMax, cylinder, pyramid, pyramidToMax. Bar3D charts only.

explosion.description: pie/doughnut slice explosion 0..400 (percent of radius); 0 removes.

invertifneg.description: if true, draw negative bars in an inverted (lighter) color.

errbars.description: error bars on each series. Format: 'type:value' where type ∈ fixedVal, percentage, stdDev, stdErr, custom. 'none' removes.

seriesshadow.description: outer shadow on every series shape. Format: 'COLOR-BLUR-ANGLE-DIST-OPACITY'; 'none' removes.

seriesoutline.description: series outline. Format: 'color', 'color:width', or 'color:width:dash' (also accepts '-' separator); 'none' removes.

firstsliceangle.description: rotation angle 0..360 of the first pie slice.

bubblescale.description: bubble size scale 0..300 (percent). Bubble charts only.

shownegbubbles.description: render negative-valued bubbles. Bubble charts only.

sizerepresents.description: how bubble size value is mapped. Values: area (default), width|w. Bubble charts only.

datatable.description: show data table beneath the chart (with default borders + legend keys).

droplines.description: drop lines on line chart. true|false toggle or line spec 'color[:width[:dash]]'; 'none' removes.

hilowlines.description: high-low lines on line/stock chart. Same format as droplines.

updownbars.description: up/down bars on line chart. true | 'gapWidth:upColor:downColor' | 'none'/'false'.

serlines.description: series lines on stacked bar charts (true/false).

increaseColor.description: waterfall: positive bar color. Add-time only.

decreaseColor.description: waterfall: negative bar color. Add-time only.

totalColor.description: waterfall: subtotal/total bar color. Add-time only.

combosplit.description: combo chart split index: first N series use primary chart type, rest use secondary. Add-time only.
